input.oldString:
<Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={() => {
                  console.log('Disconnect button clicked, isConnected:', isConnected)
                  disconnect()
                  setTimeout(() => {
                    if (isConnected) {
                      console.log('Still connected after disconnect attempt')
                    } else {
                      toast.success('Wallet disconnected')
                    }
                  }, 100)
                }}
                className="h-7 text-xs px-2"
              >
                {address?.slice(0, 6)}...{address?.slice(-4)}
              </Button>
input.newString:
<Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={async () => {
                  try {
                    console.log('Attempting to disconnect wallet...')
                    disconnect()
                    
                    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))
                    
                    if (!isConnected) {
                      toast.success('Wallet disconnected')
                    } else {
                      console.log('Wallet still connected - may be auto-connected by Farcaster')
                      toast.info('Click to reconnect with a different wallet')
                      handleConnect()
                    }
                  } catch (error) {
                    console.error('Disconnect error:', error)
                    toast.error('Failed to disconnect wallet')
                  }
                }}
                className="h-7 text-xs px-2"
              >
                {address?.slice(0, 6)}...{address?.slice(-4)}
              </Button>
